---
 id: "datagovgr-api"
 title: "datagovgrAPI"
 shortDescr: "API wrapper"
 description: "Provides data related to the Greek parliament from 1981 to 2019, including MPs, election results, and parliamentary votes."
 image: "https://cdn.stesiam.com/datagovgrAPI.webp"
 imageAlt: "greekElectionsR r package"
 githubUrl: "https://github.com/stesiam/greekElectionsR"
 path: "projects/greekElections/index.qmd"
 btnText: "Repository"
 btnText1: "Read article"
 lang: en
 order: 2
---
